# knownRouteIPs

**Instance Property**

An array of route addresses known to be on the local network.

## Declaration

```swift
var knownRouteIPs: [AVCustomRoutingPartialIP] { get set }
```

## Configuring route addresses

- **AVCustomRoutingPartialIP**: An object that represents a full or partial IP address.

items.description: An object that represents a full or partial IP address.
